'''rayasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicefem|nicefem]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicefem|nicefem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rayasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræyæshæth|ræyæshæth]] || [[word:ræyæshæj|ræyæshæj]] || [[word:ræyæshæsh|ræyæshæsh]] || [[word:ræyæshæ|ræyæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rayayashath|rayayashath]] || [[word:rayayashaj|rayayashaj]] || [[word:rayayashash|rayayashash]] || [[word:rayayasha|rayayasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rayashath|rayashath]] || [[word:rayashaj|rayashaj]] || [[word:rayashash|rayashash]] || [[word:rayasha|rayasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rayafshath|rayafshath]] || [[word:rayafshaj|rayafshaj]] || [[word:rayafshash|rayafshash]] || [[word:rayafshaf|rayafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rayashatha|rayashatha]] || [[word:rayashaja|rayashaja]] || [[word:rayashasha|rayashasha]] || [[word:rayashaka|rayashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rayashath|rayashath]] || [[word:rayashaj|rayashaj]] || [[word:rayashash|rayashash]] || [[word:rayasha|rayasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rayashathal|rayashathal]] || [[word:rayashajal|rayashajal]] || [[word:rayashashal|rayashashal]] || [[word:rayashakal|rayashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rayashathatha|rayashathatha]] || [[word:rayashajaja|rayashajaja]] || [[word:rayashashasha|rayashashasha]] || [[word:rayashaka|rayashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rayashathan|rayashathan]] || [[word:rayashajan|rayashajan]] || [[word:rayashashan|rayashashan]] || [[word:rayashakan|rayashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rayashathaoro|rayashathaoro]] || [[word:rayashajaoro|rayashajaoro]] || [[word:rayashashaoro|rayashashaoro]] || [[word:rayashakaoro|rayashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
